title: Git in 15 Minutes — Version Control for Everyone
description: A quick, practical walkthrough of the core Git workflow — init, add, commit, push, and pull. No theory overload, just the commands you'll actually use every day.

title: What Even is an API?
description: We broke down how APIs work using real-world analogies and live calls to a public API. By the end, everyone understood what was happening when an app talks to a server.

title: Intro to Python OpenCV
description: A hands-on session exploring computer vision basics with Python and OpenCV — reading images, applying filters, and detecting shapes in real time.
